description_long: This object is a modern laptop computer with a sleek, silver metallic body and a large black screen. The display is open, revealing a backlit keyboard with a spacious trackpad below it. The screen features a vivid blue abstract wallpaper, and the device sits on a flat, dark surface. The back of the laptop lid displays a prominent, glossy black Apple logo centered on the silver finish. The laptop's edges are thin and smooth, with visible speaker grilles and a minimalist design, typical of high-end consumer electronics. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and designed for portability and productivity in urban environments.
description: A sleek, silver laptop with a black screen displaying a blue abstract wallpaper and a prominent Apple logo on the back. The design is minimalist and modern, with a spacious keyboard and large trackpad.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a blue abstract wallpaper, full keyboard, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, open screen, and visible keyboard layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed-back lid with a centered black Apple logo on a silver surface.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim design, open screen, and partial keyboard visibility.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is visible, centered on the back of the laptop lid. The logo is a stylized apple with a bite taken out of the right side.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a blue abstract wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row and a large trackpad below. No numeric keypad is present.
